title: 東京大賞典の後に・トップ→トップ！

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Wooooo!
You were all amazing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Listen to those cheers...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Everyone looks so happy. We gave it our all, and
they felt our energy.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just ahead of the winning concert, Smart Falcon
falls oddly silent. Is she nervous about performing
on such a big stage? Or is it...

text_block_list.name: Rival Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Falcon!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh! You're...

text_block_list.name: Rival Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to bother you just before the concert, but I
just wanted to say... thank you.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh? For what?

text_block_list.name: Rival Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
You're that "Umadol," right? You've done so
much to liven up the dirt races.

text_block_list.name: Rival Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, there are more people here than
ever before.

text_block_list.name: Rival Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen such an enthusiastic crowd. It feels
great!

text_block_list.name: Rival Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
That's all I wanted to say. Now let's make this a
concert to remember!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: It sure was. But...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Exhale...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Don't worry. I'm totally focused.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's time for me to go, Trainer! I'm going to give
this performance my heart and soul!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out of all the dirt races so far, this winning
concert is by far the most memorable—truly
incredible on all fronts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Smart Falcon's first words upon returning from
the concert are...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I'm so frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Super frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Super-duper frustrated! Ugh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I rack my brain for some flaw in the concert or
race, but come up empty...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I just realized something.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...I've reached the top of dirt racing. This is it.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
The moment I got up on that stage... I couldn't
have been happier.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I've been onstage countless times, but I almost
never feel that kind of electricity in the air.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: But this isn't really the top—not the real one!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
And yet... everyone seems content with how
things are.

text_block_list.name: Rival Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen such an enthusiastic crowd. It feels
great!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: This isn't right. There's so much more we could do!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We have what it takes to bring the heat, enough
heat to rival the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I see now where her frustration is coming from.
After experiencing the top stage of both turf and
dirt, she can't help but compare the two.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...I guess it's all up to me.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You said my work as an Umadol affected today's
turnout. That other runner did too.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That means with enough hard work, we can make
things even bigger.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: I have to aim for the very top... of everything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our goal has always been to reach the top, so
nothing has changed. And yet, Smart Falcon
looks a little on edge.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What do you mean? I'm fired up!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And your job is to say, "Let's do it!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes tell me she's serious. As her trainer, it's
my responsibility to keep an eye on her
condition, and intervene if necessary.
choice_data_list: All I ask is that you don't go overboard.
All I ask is that you don't go overboard.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I know. Self-discipline is one of the fundamentals
of being an Umadol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So what's next? Let's figure out our next race
goal!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My next race won't have the prestige of being last
race of the year. That means it's totally up to me
to make things even more exciting than today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do have a suggestion for her—a G1 race
exclusive to senior-year racers...
choice_data_list: The February Stakes could be a good choice.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's at Tokyo Racecourse, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Same as the Japanese Derby...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are two dirt G1 races in the Twinkle
Series—the February Stakes and Champions Cup.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, these two races have better coverage
compared to those at regional racecourses.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Got it. Let's give the February Stakes a go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon has an air of determination about
her. Her first race as a senior will officially be the
February Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
This my chance to really stand out... which means
I've gotta take it!
